feedback.comment: The lessons are too fast-paced for beginners.
feedback.action: Add more pauses and checks for understanding.

feedback.comment: I want to see more visuals in the lessons.
feedback.action: Incorporate images and videos demonstrating techniques.

feedback.comment: The app crashes when I try to access the skill tree.
feedback.action: Debug the skill tree navigation and ensure stability.

implementation_steps: 2. Prioritize changes based on user impact.
3. Implement changes in the lesson engine and user interface.
4. Test the changes thoroughly before release.
